hotels.name: Hilton Garden Inn Phuket Bang Tao
hotels.primaryKeyword: hilton garden inn phuket bang tao
hotels.beachDistance: 350 m / 5 min walk to Bang Tao Beach (free shuttle)

summary.en: Hilton's reliable mid-tier brand on Bang Tao — $90–200/night, large pool, 5-min walk to the beach, 10-min walk to Boat Avenue (Phuket's best dining strip), Hilton Honors points stack normally — the smart-value pick on Bang Tao's Laguna corridor.
summary.nl: Hilton's betrouwbare mid-merk op Bang Tao — $90–200/nacht, groot zwembad, 5 min lopen naar het strand, 10 min naar Boat Avenue (Phuket's beste dining-strip), Hilton Honors-punten gewoon — de slimme keuze op Bang Tao's Laguna-strook.

en: Top Hilton Honors earner in the Laguna area — stacks elite night credits
10-min walk to Boat Avenue (Catch Beach Club, Tasting Room, Som Tam Den)
Free Bang Tao Beach shuttle every 30 min during the day
King studio rooms feel newer than the 2019 build (2024 refresh)
Dedicated workspace + fast Wi-Fi makes this the digital-nomad pick
nl: Top Hilton Honors-puntenmaker in Laguna — stapelt elite-nachten goed
10 min lopen naar Boat Avenue (Catch Beach Club, Tasting Room, Som Tam Den)
Gratis Bang Tao Beach-shuttle elke 30 min overdag
King studio's voelen nieuwer dan bouwjaar 2019 (2024 refresh)
Echte werkplek + snelle Wi-Fi — top voor digital nomads

en: Not beachfront — 5–7 min walk past Laguna villas to the sand
Limited on-site dining (1 restaurant, 1 bar) — most guests eat at Boat Avenue
Pool can get loud with families on weekends
Twin-bed options are scarce — book 2–3 weeks ahead if needed
nl: Niet aan zee — 5–7 min lopen langs Laguna-villa's naar het strand
Weinig dining ter plaatse (1 restaurant, 1 bar) — meeste gasten eten op Boat Avenue
Zwembad kan in weekenden druk worden met families
Twin-kamers zijn schaars — boek 2–3 weken vooruit indien nodig
